title: Rename device - Rename, min chars
scenario: Device name can be changed to a single character (1 byte) in Device Settings - General
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
From the Home screen, tap on the connected device to open Device Settings.
In Device Settings, tap on General.
Tap on the device's official name field to edit it.
Delete the existing name and enter a single character (1 byte).
Tap Done to save the new name.
expected: The device's name is changed successfully to the single character.
